creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
Wether "man mount", "man fstab" nor "man mount_cd9660" mention the
        fstab equivalent options for -r, -e, -g which could be extracted
	from the mount_cd9660 binary via strings and are named

		rrip
		extatt
		gens

	These missing information is a general problem in all mount_*
	manpages!

Fix: 

Correct/extend all the man pages for mount or the fstab (5) manpage!
How-To-Repeat: 
	E.g. "man mount_cd9660"
